title: A Heart For You
description: Adds new crystal food items that have special effects.
body:
Adds 3 and more new Crystal Hearts;

![Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vjoMML1u/images/822ccb556569dd043f2c69a86124ec3e81287c7f.png)

**Heart Crystal:** When consumed, player gains 2 additional max hearts permanently, players can gain upto 10 max hearts with this. Even after they die they will get back their extra hearts after respawning.

**Absorption Crystal:** When consumed, players gains 10 absorption hearts for 15 minutes, if consumed again while hearts are still active they do not stack however it will be fulled to 10 hearts again.

**Immunity Crystal:** Clears poison and withering effects and grants immunity to them for 10 minutes.

**Decay Crystal:** When consumed, for 3 minutes player and every living thing 15 block radius around them gets Wither I and Slowness I. 

_Crafting recipe for these crystals require Amethyst shards or blocks and enchanted golden apple or golden apple._

 

**New Mechanic:** Since farming amethyst in vanilla minecraft is crap, we also have a new mechanic which if you right click a **Amethyst Block with a Pickaxe[Iron or above]**, you turn that block into a **Budding Amethyst Block**.

**_This mod also restores the old enchanted golden apple craft with 8 gold blocks and 1 apple._**
 

 

_This was a mod for our modded smp. And i decided to make it public._

_#1/3_
